title: QuickCamp
description: Immersive Camping Plugin for Minecraft! Configurable, GUI menu. 1.20-1.21.4, GriefPrevention & Towny
body:
![head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/834c9764849076bd3e86514ab26b8009e805cd2c.png)
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5660d4842e4431c7c8f4418d2ee67303477b8af0.png)](https://discord.com/invite/jT8X9faerT)
[![Documentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbb66fa075769ebf5edbad48009478141755bcf3.png)](https://northvik.gitbook.io/quickcamp)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc8d91b53d1c27f5edc5ea13d253fbed785eb373.png)

<details>
<summary>Text version</summary>

**⛺ Introduction**

QuickCamp allows players to set up temporary camps while exploring, adding an RPG-style experience to their adventures. Perfect for survival servers, it provides a safe spot to rest and store items!

⚡ **Features**
- ✅ Create and edit multiple camp templates with ease.
- ✅ Customize camp sizes to fit your needs.
- ✅ Link camps to executable items for seamless placement.
- ✅ Support for custom item models using Blocks or Item Frames.
- ✅ Set up and remove temporary camps effortlessly.
- ✅ Retrieve lost camp coordinates with a simple command.
- ✅ Integrated WorldGuard support for region protection.
- ✅ Establish safe zones with no PvP or damage allowed.
- ✅ Ensure private access to camp chests and beds.
- ✅ Regularly updated to maintain compatibility and performance.

**️Commands and Permissions**


- **/camp**: Main command | Permission: quickcamp.camp | Available: true

- **/camp remove**: Removes a placed camp | Permission: quickcamp.camp | Available: true

- **/camp location**: Displays the current location of the player's camp | Permission: quickcamp.camp | Available: true

- **/camp place %template_name%**: Places a camp (executed automatically by server) | Permission: quickcamp.camp.place | Available: op

- **/camp gui**: Opens the camp management GUI | Permission: quickcamp.camp.gui | Available: op

- **/camp give %player% %template_name%**: Gives a camp item to another player | Permission: quickcamp.camp.give | Available: op

- **/camp help**: Displays help information for camp commands | Permission: quickcamp.camp.help | Available: op

**Dependencies:**
[WorldEdit](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldedit/files) Required for WorldGuard
[WorldGuard](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard/files) Required for QuickCam

  
[**DOCUMENTATION**](https://northvik.gitbook.io/quickcamp) | [**DISCORD**](https://discord.gg/jT8X9faerT)

If you spot any bugs, have suggestions, or need support, join our [**DISCORD**](https://discord.gg/jT8X9faerT) community. Your feedback is invaluable—have fun and happy crafting! ️
</details>
